ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of network device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the device was last updated */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Current OS version running on the device */,
  "last_backup_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last backed up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhcp_configurations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHCP configuration entry */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset this configuration belongs to */,
  "parent_handle" INTEGER /* Parent handle reference for hierarchical configurations */,
  "max_msg_size" INTEGER /* Maximum message size for DHCP messages */,
  "lease_time" INTEGER /* Lease time for IP addresses in seconds */,
  "msg_timeout" INTEGER /* Message timeout in seconds */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of retries for DHCP requests */,
  "request_rate" INTEGER /* Request rate of DHCP messages */,
  "release_rate" INTEGER /* Release rate of DHCP messages */,
  "starting_xid" INTEGER /* Starting transaction ID for DHCP transactions */,
  "outstanding_session_count" INTEGER /* Number of outstanding sessions */,
  "seq_type" TEXT /* Sequence type for message handling */,
  "port_state" INTEGER /* Current state of the port (e.g., IDLE) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Is the configuration active? */,
  "local_active" INTEGER /* Is the local configuration active? */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle associated with the configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "alarm_state" TEXT /* Current alarm state of the configuration */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dhcp_configurations_parent_handle FOREIGN KEY ("parent_handle") REFERENCES dhcp_configurations ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dhcp_configurations_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset of configurations */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration associated with the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., HIGH_MEMORY_USAGE) */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Is the alarm resolved? */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES dhcp_configurations ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of what was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device this metric is associated with */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric being recorded (e.g., CPU_USAGE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Rate at which the metric is sampled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the template was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., CONFIG_CHANGE) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* Client IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who has the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
